impact.headline: 10 verified downstream assets at risk
impact.summary: DataHub verifies the drop column request for discount_amount on b2fd91.ORDER_ENTRY_DB.analytics.order_details in PROD. Its retrieved column lineage contains 10 downstream assets.
impact.why_it_matters: The retrieved lineage exposes 8 BI reporting assets to the schema change. Ownership is grounded in 12 distinct DataHub owner record(s); actions without a retrieved owner remain explicitly unassigned. Bounded model risk focus: schema validation, downstream breakage, BI reporting disruption, unowned dependencies, source-governance review.
evidence: DataHub schema confirms discount_amount on b2fd91.ORDER_ENTRY_DB.analytics.order_details in PROD.
DataHub column lineage returns 10 downstream assets for discount_amount.
Downstream platforms: 2 Looker, 6 Power BI, 2 Snowflake.
Source governance signals: tag: PII_Data, tag: Authoritative Source, term: PII, term: Certified.
DataHub returned 3 prior ContextLoop incident memories linked to this source.

actions.title: Validate the drop column of discount_amount on b2fd91.ORDER_ENTRY_DB.analytics.order_details before deployment.
Test all 10 retrieved downstream assets after the schema change.
Review DataHub ownership and assign any unowned affected assets before approval.
Run refresh and quality checks for the 8 retrieved BI reporting assets.
Record the decision and rollback evidence in DataHub.
